{{CargoRelic
|name=Key of Redemption
|class_id=20222
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This antique key holds an unimaginable power of faith, and if you listen closely, you can hear the prayers of believers, "Lord, please give us what we have dreamed of..."
|fame=13
|art=17
|fth=31
|civ=18
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Angel Form Tier, Snail HP +100<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss2=Per Angel Form Tier, Snail HP +200<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss3=Per Angel Form Tier, Snail HP +300<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss4=Per Angel Form Tier, Snail HP +300<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss7=Per Angel Form Tier, Snail HP +300<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9<br> (Awakened)
}}
